verdict_reasoning: IZUMO4 is an IZUMO family member but is annotated as nuclear-resident, unlike IZUMO1/2/3 which have surface/membrane roles in sperm-egg fusion. IZUMO4 lacks a predicted transmembrane domain and GPI anchor; its UniProt entry describes it as a nuclear protein. No surface isoforms, TM anchors, or documented PM pool have been reported. The IZUMO family membership alone does not override the nuclear localization when the protein itself lacks a membrane anchor. No cell-surface-directed therapeutic programs are known. Nuclear classification is appropriate.
